_comment: required_status_checks intentionally omitted — daemon pushes already-merged feature/<slug> refs via git push; PR status-check gate does not apply to that path. See docs/architecture-spec.md §3 and src/baton_harness/chain/merge.py:merge_issue_branch. The 'update' rule below is the load-bearing control: without it, any actor with Contents:write can fast-forward push even when deletion and non-fast-forward are blocked. Only the App installation bypass actor can push to feature/*. See https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-rulesets/available-rules-for-rulesets#restrict-updates
name: harness-feature-daemon-only
